member.name: T:UIFramework.UIFController
member.summary: Custom components that will serve as views in this MVP/MVC-ish pattern
member.remarks: I may have gone a little crazy with inheritance
member.summary: Custom components that will serve as views in this MVP/MVC-ish pattern
member.remarks: I may have gone a little crazy with inheritance

member.name: P:UIFramework.UIFController.Entry.DescriptionText
member.summary: Sets the description text

member.name: P:UIFramework.UIFController.Entry.DisplayName
member.summary: Sets the identifier text

member.name: P:UIFramework.UIFController.Entry.EntryModel
member.summary: Runs when the model property has been set.

member.name: M:UIFramework.UIFController.Entry.SaveAction
member.summary: This is called when the Save button is pressed. Override to create custom behaviour.
member.remarks: Generally MelonPreferences are saved from the category, not the indivial entries.

member.name: T:UIFramework.UIFController.MelonEntry
member.summary: Inherit this class to create your own custom entry controllers for your own input controls. TODO: Refactor this to suggest non-melon related settings storage

member.name: T:UIFramework.UIFController.TextInputEntry
member.summary: Base controller for text fields

member.name: P:UIFramework.UIFController.TextInputEntry._prefModel
member.summary: TODO: This is jank. Deal with this by creating a base class for preference entries that aren't based on melonloader.

member.name: P:UIFramework.UIFController.TextInputEntry.textField
member.summary: Returns the textfield

member.name: P:UIFramework.UIFController.TextInputEntry.PlaceHolderText
member.summary: Sets the placeholder text in the textField

member.name: T:UIFramework.UIFController.ListArea
member.summary: Areas where UI elements are shown to the user. 1. Mod list Sidebar 2. Category tab top bar 3. Entries Content area

member.name: M:UIFramework.UIFController.ListArea.SetModel(UIFramework.UIFModel.IHoldSubmodels)
member.summary: Sets the underlying data model for the current instance.
member.remarks: Calling this method updates the internal state to reflect the provided model. Subsequent operations may depend on the newly set model.
member.param: The model to associate with this instance. Cannot be null.

member.name: M:UIFramework.UIFController.ListArea.BuildFromModelList
member.summary: Clears the contents and recreates them from the submodels list in Model

member.name: M:UIFramework.UIFController.ListArea.SaveAction
member.summary: Is called when Save ButtonGo is clicked. Override to create custom behaviour

member.name: T:UIFramework.UIFController.PrefList
member.summary: Main body of the UI. Lists individual preferences

member.name: M:UIFramework.UIFController.PrefList.SaveAction
member.summary: When the save button is clicked, the selected category save action will be called. The model is now in charge of what that means

member.name: M:UIFramework.UIFController.TabButtonController.OnSelect
member.summary: Runs when the button is clicked. Implement this in inheriting classes.
member.remarks: IL2CPP does not like abstract methods 😭

member.name: T:UIFramework.UIFController.IChildable
member.summary: Controllers for models that can be submodels of other models. Preference Entries Mod Buttons Category Buttons

member.name: P:UIFramework.UIFController.IChildable.Model
member.summary: Reference to the model the controller works from.

member.name: M:UIFramework.UIFController.WindowController.BuildModList
member.summary: Resets the containers and build the modlist

member.name: M:UIFramework.UIFController.WindowController.SaveButtonClick
member.summary: Gets called when the save button gets clicked.
member.remarks: Generally Melonpreferences are saved by category. But this iterates through the child controllers and call their SaveAction() method. This allows for custom behavior before the actual category gets saved

member.name: T:UIFramework.UIFModel
member.summary:
Models define how the UI is built. The heirarchy is simple and follows melonpreferences basic structure ModelMod -> ModelMelonCategory -> ModelMelonEntry Modders can use the default model just by calling UIF.Register(modInstance, categories) in their OnLateInitializeMelon. The default model will use simple input methods: bools will be toggles, strings will be text input fields and so would numerics. More options will eventually be available: sliders, dropdowns, multi checkboxes, radio buttons, etc.
Those will be developed after the default model is functional

member.name: T:UIFramework.UIFModel.SelectableModelBase
member.summary: Models that represent buttons on the sidebar and topbar

member.name: P:UIFramework.UIFModel.SelectableModelBase.SubModels
member.summary: List of submodels for the model

member.name: M:UIFramework.UIFModel.SelectableModelBase.GetSubmodel(System.String)
member.summary: General submodel finder.

member.name: M:UIFramework.UIFModel.SelectableModelBase.AddSubmodel(UIFramework.UIFModel.IModelable[])
member.summary: Add a new submodel to the list

member.name: M:UIFramework.UIFModel.SelectableModelBase.DiscardAction
member.summary: Called when the discard button is pressed

member.name: M:UIFramework.UIFModel.ModelModItem.SaveAction
member.summary: Calls individual category models' SaveAction method.

member.name: E:UIFramework.UIFModel.ModelModItem.OnModSaved
member.summary: Subscribe to this event to run code after all the categories for the mod have been saved. This will only run if your mod is the currently selelcted mod.

member.name: P:UIFramework.UIFModel.ModelEntryItem.OnUICreated
member.summary: Called when the corresponding UI element is created

member.name: T:UIFramework.UIFModel.ModelDataEntryBase
member.summary: A model for interfacing with a piece of data.

member.name: P:UIFramework.UIFModel.ButtonEntry.BoxedValue
member.summary: This is only to satisfy the contract for IEntry.

member.name: T:UIFramework.UIFModel.IModelable
member.summary: Implemented by all models

member.name: P:UIFramework.UIFModel.IModelable.Identifier
member.summary: Name for the model

member.name: P:UIFramework.UIFModel.IModelable.DisplayName
member.summary: User-facing display name. Should return Identifier if not assigned to a value

member.name: M:UIFramework.UIFModel.IModelable.GetNewUIInstance
member.summary: Instantiates a new Game object associated with them model

member.name: M:UIFramework.UIFModel.IModelable.SaveAction
member.summary: Should be called when save button is pressed. Runs after all ancestor's save actions have been run

member.name: T:UIFramework.UIFModel.IHoldSubmodels
member.summary: Models that contain submodels. Generally these are mods and categories representing tabs

member.name: P:UIFramework.UIFModel.IHoldSubmodels.SubModels
member.summary: A list of submodels

member.name: M:UIFramework.UIFModel.IHoldSubmodels.GetSubmodel(System.String)
member.summary: Finds submodel by identifier

member.name: M:UIFramework.UIFModel.IHoldSubmodels.AddSubmodel(UIFramework.UIFModel.IModelable[])
member.summary: Adds a new submodel to the SubModels list

member.name: T:UIFramework.UIFModel.IEntry
member.summary: Goes on the main panel. Contains controls for manipulating preferences or just general UI controls

member.name: P:UIFramework.UIFModel.IEntry.Identifier
member.summary: Name/ID of the entry

member.name: P:UIFramework.UIFModel.IEntry.Description
member.summary: Description of the entry

member.name: M:UIFramework.UIFModel.IEntry.SaveAction
member.summary: Ideally called by the controller to define a save action

member.name: P:UIFramework.UIFModel.IEntry.OnUICreated
member.summary: Called when the Entry has been created. Useful when you wanna change specific elements after creation

member.name: T:UIFramework.UIFModel.IStorable
member.summary: implemented by models that store data

member.name: F:UIFramework.UIFModel.ModelMelonCategory.PrefCat
member.summary: The MelonPreferences_Category object this adapts into the framework

member.name: M:UIFramework.UIFModel.ModelMelonCategory.#ctor(MelonLoader.MelonPreferences_Category,UIFramework.UIFModel.ModelModItem)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of this class based on a MelonPreferences_Category

member.name: P:UIFramework.UIFModel.ModelMelonEntry.PrefEntry
member.summary: MelonPreferences_Entry this model is meant to adapt

member.name: P:UIFramework.UIFModel.ModelMelonEntry.BoxedValue
member.summary: Direct access to the PrefEntry boxedvalue property

member.name: M:UIFramework.UIFModel.ModelMelonEntry.#ctor(MelonLoader.MelonPreferences_Entry,UIFramework.UIFModel.ModelCategoryItem)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of this object based around a MelonPreferences_Entry object

member.name: P:UIFramework.UIFModel.ModelMelonEntry.SavedValue
member.summary: The value actually saved to the file.

member.name: M:UIFramework.UIFModel.ModelMelonEntry.SetUIPrefabSource(UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Use this function to provide your own prefab for this entry. The prefab must have a component that implements IUIFrameworkEntry and properly handles the value changes and saving. If no prefab is provided, a default one will be used based on the type of the preference (bools will be toggles, strings will be text input fields and so would numerics).

member.name: M:UIFramework.UIFModel.ModelMelonEntry.GetNewUIInstance
member.summary: Returns an instance of the game object associated with the MelonPreferences_Entry type. If a custom one is provided, it will return an instance of that instead
member.returns: TODO: Move this to the UI builders as this is ui logic

member.name: M:UIFramework.Core.VRActivationAction
member.summary: Checks if activation by VR input has been pressed

member.name: M:UIFramework.Debug.DiffLog(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Call in OnUpdate to monitor variables per frame but only logs if they change

member.name: T:UIFramework.UI
member.summary: primary public facing class, modders will interact with this to register their preferences and build the UI.

member.name: M:UIFramework.UI.Register(MelonLoader.MelonMod,MelonLoader.MelonPreferences_Category[])
member.summary: Registers a mod and its categories to the UI instance.
member.param: The range of MelonPreferences_Category objects used by your mod.
member.remarks:
Unless the dependency was explicitly declared, Don't use before OnLateInitializeMelon. Currently, registration after the first gym load means your mod won't show up on the mod list
Deprecated: this version of the Register function will be removed in a future version in favor of taking in the MelonBase type instead Please explicitly cast your mod instance as MelonBase to prevent future incompatibility So UI.Register((MelonBase)this, Category1, Category2,...);
member.returns: A reference to the created Mod Model for further customization

member.name: M:UIFramework.UI.Register(MelonLoader.MelonBase,MelonLoader.MelonPreferences_Category[])
member.summary: Registers a mod or a plugin to UIFramework along with its categories.
member.remarks: Unless the dependency was explicitly declared, Don't use before OnLateInitializeMelon. Currently, registration after the first gym load means your mod won't show up on the mod list

member.name: M:UIFramework.UI.Register(MelonLoader.MelonMod)
member.summary: Registers a mod with no categories to the framework. Categories need to be manually added

member.name: M:UIFramework.UI.Register(MelonLoader.MelonBase)
member.summary: Registers a mod or plugin with no categories to the framework. Categories need to be manually added

member.name: F:UIFramework.Prefabs.UIFGameObjects
member.summary: Root Game Object for all of UI in DDOL

member.name: F:UIFramework.Prefabs.AssetBundleLoaded
member.summary: UI Assets from the asset bundle

member.name: F:UIFramework.Prefabs.TempStorage
member.summary: Temporary game object storage as they're being instantiated

member.name: T:UIFramework.Helpers
member.summary: contains various helper functions ToNormal: Normalizes a string GetDisplayNames

member.name: M:UIFramework.Helpers.ToNormal(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a normalized version of the specified string by converting it to lowercase, trimming whitespace, and removing all spaces.
member.param: The string to normalize. Cannot be null.
member.returns: A normalized string with all spaces removed, trimmed, and converted to lowercase.
member.remarks: Returns empty string if input only contains whitespace

member.name: T:UIFramework.Preferences
member.summary: UI's own preferences go here
